data.chapter_title_en: Words of remembrance for morning and evening
data.arabic_text: ((اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْماً نَافِعاً، وَرِزْقاً طَيِّباً، وَعَمَلاً مُتَقَبَّلاً)) (إذا أصبحَ).
data.english_text: (O Allah, I ask You for knowledge which is beneficial and sustenance which is good, and deeds which are acceptable.)
data.transliteration: (Allahumma innee as-aluka AAilman nafiAAan, warizqan tayyiban, waAAamalan mutaqabbalan.)

LANGUAGE_ARABIC_TRANSLATED_TEXT.raw: (Allahumma innee as-aluka AAilman nafiAAan, warizqan tayyiban, waAAamalan mutaqabbalan.)
